headlines.title: OpenAI GPT-5.4 Released with 1-Million-Token Context Window
headlines.summary: OpenAI unveiled GPT-5.4 featuring a 1-million-token context window and the ability to autonomously execute multi-step workflows across software environments. This represents a significant leap in AI capability for enterprise automation.

headlines.title: Anthropic Acquires Biotech Startup for $400M
headlines.summary: Anthropic has acquired a biotech startup for $400 million, signaling deeper expansion into AI-powered healthcare and life sciences applications.

headlines.title: Google Gemini 3.1 Pro Leads 13 of 16 Benchmarks
headlines.summary: Google's Gemini 3.1 Pro continues to dominate the AI landscape, currently leading in 13 of 16 industry benchmarks. The model has positioned Google as the consumer AI leader in early 2026.

headlines.title: Claude Code Source Code Leaked
headlines.summary: Claude Code's source code appears to have accidentally leaked from Anthropic, though the company has not yet made an official statement about the incident.

headlines.title: Enterprise Users Increasingly Favor Anthropic Over OpenAI
headlines.summary: A notable shift is occurring in enterprise AI adoption, with more enterprise users favoring Anthropic over OpenAI in 2026, marking a reversal of previous trends.

top_story.title: OpenAI GPT-5.4 Released with 1-Million-Token Context Window
top_story.summary: OpenAI has unveiled GPT-5.4, featuring a massive 1-million-token context window and the groundbreaking ability to autonomously execute multi-step workflows across software environments. This release represents a significant advancement in AI agent capabilities, allowing the model to handle complex, long-form tasks that were previously impossible.
top_story.why_it_matters: The 1-million-token context window combined with autonomous workflow execution positions GPT-5.4 as a true enterprise automation tool. This could revolutionize how businesses handle document analysis, code refactoring, and complex multi-step processes that require maintaining context across vast amounts of information.
